title: DeFi Wallet Dashboard
description: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.
useCase: Build a full-featured DeFi portfolio dashboard like Zapper that shows token balances, historical portfolio value chart, and recent DEX trades for any wallet.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to build the dashboard for
